title: arctostaphylos crustacea subsp. insulicola
intro: Arctostaphylos crustacea subsp. insulicola, also known as the island bearberry or Santa Cruz Island bearberry, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the heath family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant content, which has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos crustacea subsp. insulicola include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost immune function, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and berries can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to address various health concerns, including digestive issues and stress relief.
